subject: [PATCH v2 070/110] affs: replace PRIino with %llu/%llx format strings

reviews.author: Jeff Layton (author)
reviews.summary: The author is responding to a review comment about the patch replacing PRIino format macro with concrete format strings in affs. The reviewer had pointed out that some uses of %llu and %llx were incorrect, but the author simply re-posted the original patch description without addressing the specific issues.
sentiment_signals: lack of response to specific feedback

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch replaces the PRIino format macro with concrete format strings %llu and %llx in the AFFS (Amiga File System) code, which is now using u64 for inode numbers.
